input.background: Let A represent cat ownership and B represent dog ownership. Suppose 35% of households in a population own cats, 30% own dogs, and 15% own both a cat and a dog. In selecting a household at random:
input.question: What is the probability of owning a cat (Pr(A))?

meta_info.caption: Pet ownership illustration.
meta_info.section: 5.5  More RULES AND PROPERTIES OF PROBABILITY
